method: Inspected every record in src/PlanCatalog.Core/Models/, src/PlanCatalog.Contracts/References/, src/PlanCatalog.Contracts/Bundles/, src/PlanCatalog.Contracts/Manifests/, every JSON schema in schemas/, every validator in src/PlanCatalog.Core/Validation/, CatalogSourceSnapshot's FindX methods, and CatalogBundleAssembler.

keyOnlyCrossArtifactReferences.rationale: Directly determines which specific published WorkoutDefinition artifact instances end up in a PublishedTemplateBundle; not an abstract capability/family filter.
Directly determines which specific published WorkoutDefinition artifact instances end up in a PublishedTemplateBundle.

resolutionMechanism.behavior: Workouts.Where(key match && not retired).OrderByDescending(Version).FirstOrDefault() -- auto-selects the highest non-retired version for a bare key.
resolutionMechanism.isolationNote: The only FindX method on CatalogSourceSnapshot that performs auto-version-selection; every other FindX method takes a VersionedCatalogReference and does an exact match with no auto-selection.

namedFieldsInTaskThatAreNotKeyOnly.verified: Already carries documentType+key+version; resolved via FindWorkoutProgression, exact match. Not key-only.
Already carries documentType+key+version; resolved via FindProgressionModifier, exact match. Not key-only.
All four fields already carry exact versions; resolved via exact-match FindX methods. Not key-only.

Already carries exact versions -- not key-only. However flagged separately as Finding 7 in deterministic-graph-prechange-assessment.json: a versioned reference that is never consulted by bundle assembly and can silently disagree with TemplateCombinationDefinition.RulePack's version -- a duplicate-ownership/consistency defect, a different class from Findings 5/6.

nonDependencyIdentifiers.reason: Local identifier scoped to the owning progression's own stage list; never resolved against another catalog artifact.
Literal permitted value strings, not references to other catalog documents.
Free-text/enum-like label, not an artifact key.
Identity field of the bundle itself, not a reference to a different artifact.
Identity fields of the release itself.
Only meaningful paired with the same record's DocumentType+Version fields -- not a standalone key-only reference.

legacySchemaOnlyNote: None found. Every document type in schemas/ has exactly one schema version (schemaVersion: 1) currently in use -- no schema evolution history exists yet.
